reasoning: The TMC has given me the schemes I hold in my hand—Khadya Sathi, Swasthya Sathi, Kanyashree. These are real things that feed my family and keep my daughter in school. I have voted for TMC since 2011 because they delivered, not like the Left before. Shantanu is a big name, yes, and I see him on the television, but what does it change for my house? The BJP does not give me what TMC gives me. My ration card works because of TMC. That is where my vote goes.
primary_drivers: Consistent delivery of material welfare schemes (Khadya Sathi, Swasthya Sathi, Kanyashree)
Long-term voting pattern with TMC since 2011
Practical household needs over big political names and positions
